purpose: Define a stable festival-year key so master, tourism, finance, procurement and case evidence can be joined without false hidden-relationship claims.

normalization_rules.rule: Remove edition numbers, year prefixes, excessive spacing, brackets and marketing subtitles; preserve distinctive core nouns such as 머드, 산천어, 단오, 유등.
Map old/new province names and special-city variants to current canonical Korean names while retaining raw source value.
Use festival start/end dates from the most authoritative source for that year; if dates changed, store observed schedule and revised schedule separately.
Use the primary venue or first listed venue; keep multi-venue notes in venue_detail.
Split host, organizer, supervisor, procurement agent, contracting party and payment party into separate relationship records.

criteria: source identifier such as notice number, contract number or official dataset row
date or venue differs in a plausible schedule-change pattern
source is a plan, preview or media article without official identifier
different year with no recurrence explanation
attachment title contradicts the candidate festival
